results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed's Interest Rate Decision: April 29, 2026 - dshort - Advisor Perspectives
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board - Trump's legal attacks have 'left me no choice'
US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board
Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end

summary: FOMC voted April 29, 2026 to hold rates at 3.5%-3.75%. Unusual 4-member dissent — Miran wanted cut, Hammack/Kashkari/Logan opposed easing bias language. Powell announced he will remain on the Board of Governors. Last time 4 members dissented was October 1992. Elevated energy-driven inflation and Middle East uncertainty cited as key factors.
